zh.lifeSummary: Eufemia Thorpe是William Thorpe和Margaret Porter的女兒，出生在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可。她於1543年1月27日與Robert Judsonne在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1594年在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國越可爾哈利法可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eufemia Thorpe是William Thorpe和Margaret Porter的女儿，出生在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可。她于1543年1月27日与Robert Judsonne在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1594年在她的家乡，埋葬在英国越可爾哈利法可。

nameMeanings.name: Thorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): from Middle English thorp(e) ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English thorp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from any of several places called Thorp(e), which are most frequent in Yorkshire, the Midlands, and East Anglia. Compare Throop .

variants.name: Trupp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Hermann, Reinhold.

English (Herefordshire and Monmouthshire): variant of   Thorpe  , or from a place so named, such as Thrupp (Berkshire, Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire), Thrupe (Somerset), Throop (Dorset, Hampshire, Somerset), and Throope (Wiltshire).

variants.name: Throop
meanings: English: from Middle English throp ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English throp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from Throop in Hampshire, Throope in Wiltshire, Thrup in Oxfordshire, or any of the places called Thrupp in Berkshire, Gloucestershire, and Northamptonshire. Compare Thorpe .

variants.name: Tharpe
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Thorpe  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thorp
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Thorpe  .

variants.name: Troup
meanings: Scottish (eastern): habitational name from a place in the parish of Gamrie, near Banff. The placename is unexplained, perhaps a Pictish cognate of Welsh trwp ‘vessel, dish, basin’.
Possibly also English, a metathesized form of   Thorpe  .

nameMeanings.name: Eufemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Eufemia Thorpe was born in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of William Thorpe and Margaret Porter. She married Robert Judsonne on 27 January 1543, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1594, in her hometown, and was buried in Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Eufemia Thorpe est née à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de William Thorpe et Margaret Porter. Elle a épousé Robert Judsonne le 27 janvier 1543, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1594, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Eufemia Thorpe wurde in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von William Thorpe und Margaret Porter geboren. Sie hat am 27. Januar 1543 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Judsonne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1594 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Halifax, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Eufemia Thorpe è nata il nel Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di William Thorpe e Margaret Porter. Lei sposato Robert Judsonne il 27 gennaio 1543, nel Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1594, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eufemia ThorpeはイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでWilliam ThorpeとMargaret Porterの娘として生まれた。1543年1月27日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでRobert Judsonneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1594年に故郷で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eufemia Thorpe(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 William Thorpe(와)과 Margaret Porter의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1543년 1월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 Robert Judsonne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eufemia Thorpe nasceu em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de William Thorpe e Margaret Porter. Ela casou-se com Robert Judsonne em 27 de janeiro de 1543, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1594, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Eufemia Thorpe родилась в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали William Thorpe и Margaret Porter. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Judsonne 27 января 1543 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1594 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Eufemia Thorpe nació en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de William Thorpe y Margaret Porter. Se casó con Robert Judsonne el 27 de enero de 1543, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1594, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
